title: Every fusion startup that has raised over $100M
slides: Who is actually funding fusion energy's future?
Over a dozen startups have crossed $100M each.
Most rely on unproven magnetic or laser designs.
Your energy portfolio must track these now.
Map the funded ones before picking a bet.
thread_text:
Who’s really funding fusion?

Over a dozen startups have each raised over $100 million.

Most designs still untested.

Magnetic confinement and laser ignition remain unproven at scale.

Your portfolio is exposed.

Public equity funds already track these companies, whether you know it or not.

Map the funded networks.

Visualize which investors back which designs before you bet.

Check your holdings now.

Most fusion startups aren't public. Look up which VCs are in your fund's top ten.

instagram.caption:
Over a dozen fusion startups have each raised over $100 million, but most of their reactor designs are still untested at scale.

Private money is flooding magnetic confinement and laser ignition concepts that have never produced net energy. Public equity funds already track these companies, whether you know it or not.

Check your portfolio’s top holdings. Most fusion startups aren’t public—look up which VCs your fund uses 🔍

Which unproven design is your retirement money backing right now? 💥⚡

Most designs rely on magnetic confinement or laser ignition, both unproven for commercial power.
